'''chataya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fib|fib]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fib|fib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chataya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || chætæyæth || chætæyæj || chætæyæsh || chætæyæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || chatatayath || chatatayaj || chatatayash || chatataya
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || chatayath || chatayaj || chatayash || chataya
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || chatafyafth || chatafyafj || chatafyafsh || chatafyaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || chatayatha || chatayaja || chatayasha || chatayaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || chatayath || chatayaj || chatayash || chataya
|-
| [[Possessive]] || chatayathal || chatayajal || chatayashal || chatayakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || chatayaathatha || chatayaajaja || chatayaashasha || chatayaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || chatayathan || chatayajan || chatayashan || chatayakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || chatayathaoro || chatayajaoro || chatayashaoro || chatayakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
